Off Calendar Sep-22-2003 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Sep-11-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: JoAnn Prior.
Appearances:
Kim McDaniel, Esq. for Plaintiff City National Bank, Plaintiff's witness, William Hoey present was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, declaration of Robert Malsman, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant as follows:
Principal of $98,400.00.
Attorney's fees of $5,206.00.
Costs of $344.50.
Interest of $44,576.56. For the total of $148,527.06.
Judgment signed in open court.
